detect_anomalies()

span.p:
Z-score 算法
z = (x - μ) / σ

div.style: color: rgb(55, 71, 79) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
计算均值 μ
计算标准差 σ

span.p:
GET /api/trend-forecast
calculate_trend_forecast()
移动平均+线性回归

div.style: color: rgb(55, 71, 79) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(55, 71, 79) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step2: 7日移动平均
Σ(7日金额)/7
消除单日波动

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step3: 线性回归
y = a·x + b
最小二乘法

div.style: color: rgb(55, 71, 79) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
斜率 a = Σ(xi-x̄)(yi-ȳ)
/ Σ(xi-x̄)²
截距 b = ȳ - a·x̄

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
趋势判定
斜率方向
